title: Premier Housewares Small Red/White Baking Dish 0.16 Liters Oven Proof Dishes For Baking Lasagna Dishes/Bakeware For Various Dishes and Desserts 9 x 5 x 12
features: Easy to use and safe, this baking dish is both microwave and freezer safe, which allows you to both bake and freeze various food items
Heat resistant, this dish is heat resistant and ovenproof, the stoneware allows it to withstand 250°C
Multipurpose, this baking dish can be used to try out new delicious recipes and dishes, be it a dessert or something savoury
Minimalistic, basic and stylish, the red baking dish is not only useful but also has a pretty and minimalistic appearance
Size and capacity, this baking dish has optimal size and is quite deep, it has a total capacity of 0.16 liters and a size of 9 x 5 x 12
description: Make your favorite desserts and savoury items with Premier Housewares small red dish. The dish is made out of stoneware and has a sleek and glossy finish to it. Both the inside and outside of the dish are of pure red colour, giving it a stylish, basic and minimalistic appearance. This makes it ideal for both kitchen use and for serving purposes, and allows it to complement most of your kitchenware. The oven-proof dish is not only appealing to the eye but also very durable and reliable. The dish promises to withstand a temperature of up to 250°C. This means that you can bake all of your favorite dishes without the fear of damaging the dish. Also, it is microwave friendly and freezer friendly so place it wherever it needs to be placed without a worry. The dish is ideal for: -food prep -cooking -dessert baking -sweet treats and so much more! The oven dish has a capacity of up to 0.16 liters and is deeper than your regular oven-proof dishes. This means that you can bake cakes and try out various dessert recipes. This also means that you can cook layered dishes with ease!
